title: Intensely Flavored Spanish Peas Patatas-Bravas Style
description: A briny, silky, quick-fix Spanish dish featuring split peas and a flambe effect, served with a hot stone plate, no onion, no garlic.

ingredients.name: Red pepper flakes
ingredients.notes: Use if you prefer a spicier version.

ingredients.name: Flour
ingredients.notes: For the starch to thicken the sauce.

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the smoked paprika and red pepper flakes, cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the salt and black pepper, stir to combine.
Add the split peas, water, and white wine vinegar to the saucepan, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 8 minutes, or until the peas are tender.
Mix the flour with a little water to make a slurry, then stir it into the pea mixture.
Increase the heat to medium, add the butter, and flambe until the sauce thickens. Serve hot on a hot stone plate.
